1.name: MODE/SYNC
1.description: Mode Selection and External Synchronization Input Pin. Tie to GND for forced continuous mode, float or tie to INTVCC for Burst Mode. Can be driven by an external clock.

2.name: PGOOD
2.description: Open-Drain Power Good Output Pin. Pulled to ground when FB is not within +/-8% of reference.

3.name: SW
3.description: Switch Node Output Pin. Connect to the external inductor.

4.name: SW
4.description: Switch Node Output Pin. Connect to the external inductor.

6.name: BOOST
6.description: Boosted Floating Driver Supply Pin. Connect a bootstrap capacitor between this pin and SW.

7.name: INTVCC
7.description: Internal 3.3V Regulator Output Pin. Decouple with a low ESR ceramic capacitor to PGND.

8.name: VON
8.description: On-Time Voltage Input Pin. Sets the voltage trip point for the on-time comparator.

9.name: SGND
9.description: Signal Ground Pin. Reference ground for feedback, compensation, and RT resistor. In MSE package, this is the exposed pad.

10.name: RT
10.description: Oscillator Frequency Program Pin. Connect a resistor to SGND to set frequency, or tie to INTVCC for 2MHz.

11.name: FB
11.description: Output Voltage Feedback Pin. Connect to resistor divider to program output voltage.

12.name: ITH
12.description: Error Amplifier Output and Switching Regulator Compensation Pin. Tie to INTVCC for internal compensation.

13.name: TRACK
13.description: Output Voltage Tracking and Soft-Start Input Pin. Internal 1.4uA pull-up current.

14.name: RUN
14.description: Regulator Enable Pin. Above 1.25V enables, below 1V shuts down. Do not float.

15.name: VIN
15.description: Main Power Supply Input Pins. Decouple to PGND with low ESR capacitor.

16.name: VIN
16.description: Main Power Supply Input Pins. Decouple to PGND with low ESR capacitor.

17.name: PGND
17.description: Power Ground Pin. Connect to input and output bypass capacitors. In QFN package, this is the exposed pad.
